StockItem.title: StockItem
StockItem.description: An item in the AOT Revolution stock catalog

id.description: The unique slug identifier of the item

description.description: Special specifications or instructions of the item

imageUrl.description: HTTP image asset URL or base64 upload

isPinned.description: Flag to mark card pinned at top

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when item was saved

items/{itemId}.description: The database storage location for available catalog stock items
